rows.label: qev050902_MSG0001
rows.name: Hm?! Who goes there...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0002
rows.name:
...?
Gu Ladha... and an Earthling?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0003
rows.name:
Not an uncommon pairing, but...
What is your business here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0004
rows.name:
I apologize for the sudden visit accompanied by an outsider.
I have come because there is a favor
I desperately wish to ask of you, Platoon Commander.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0005
rows.name:
Ho. To think you would come forward with a request of your own accord...
...Let us hear it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0006
rows.name:
Yes, sir!
I have come today to request
a reassignment for myself![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0007
rows.name: A reassignment...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0008
rows.name:
Yes, sir!
I would like you to assign me
as a liaison with the Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0009
rows.name:
Meaning...
You wish to distance yourself from the front lines?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0010
rows.name:
Huh...?
N-no! That is not the case at all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0011
rows.name:
Do not try to deceive me!
This proposal is undoubtedly born from cowardice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0012
rows.name: Did you truly think such a request would be approved?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0013
rows.name: You are mistaken! I am...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0014
rows.name:
Moreover, bringing an Earthling along with you...
Just what are you scheming?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0015
rows.name:
They understand my situation...
And my request for a reassignment this time
was made taking their opinion into account...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0016
rows.name:
So, they are an ally. I see...
...Very well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0017
rows.name:
Let us see just how trustworthy
the opinions of this ally of yours truly are...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0018
rows.name:
Allow me to ascertain the measure
of your ally's caliber.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0019
rows.name:
If they can demonstrate their skill as a warrior,
and the intelligence and initiative to flawlessly execute my request...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0020
rows.name: I shall consider approving your proposal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0021
rows.name: And this mission... to measure their caliber is...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0022
rows.name: It is quite simple.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0023
rows.name:
A Bloodied Face, Reinforced Blade Parts,
and Next-Gen Main Core Parts. Gather these three materials
and bring them to me. That is all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0024
rows.name: Is that... all?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0025
rows.name: Yes, that is all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0026
rows.name:
To the BLADE over there...
A Bloodied Face, Reinforced Blade Parts,
and Next-Gen Main Core Parts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0027
rows.name:
You will accept this request for Gu Ladha's sake,
will you not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0028
rows.name:
Gathering materials such as a Bloodied Face,
Reinforced Blade Parts, and Next-Gen Main Core Parts...
I must admit, I came up with a rather materialistic request.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0029
rows.name:
I apologize for dragging you into this, but...
Could I ask you to act on Gu Ladha's behalf
just a little longer?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0030
rows.name:
Perhaps she has been waiting to meet an ally
like you all this while.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050902_MSG0031
rows.name: Someone... who can give her the push she needs.[ST:wait ]
